subcodes.first_line: I beseech Thee, O my God and God of all Names, and my Sovereign and Sovereign of all things, and my Lord and Lord of earth and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسئلک یا الهی و اله الاسماء و سلطانی و سلطان الاشیاء و مالکی و مالک الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
